description_long: This object consists of two large, cylindrical metal barrels, one painted blue and the other red, both showing significant signs of rust and weathering. Black, viscous liquid appears to be leaking from the tops and down the sides, suggesting the barrels contain or previously contained hazardous or oily substances. Each barrel features a prominent warning label: the blue barrel has an orange label, while the red barrel has a yellow one, both with hazard symbols. The barrels have three horizontal reinforcement bands around their circumference, adding structural strength. The tops are open and filled with the same black liquid, with no visible lids or covers. The overall appearance is industrial and aged, suitable for use in gritty urban or industrial environments.
description: Two weathered, rusted metal barrels—one blue, one red—leak black liquid and display hazard labels, with open tops and visible reinforcement bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing both barrels side by side, with visible hazard labels and black liquid stains running down the sides.
description_view_1: Rear view of the barrels, primarily showing the red barrel in front with heavy black liquid stains and no visible labels.
description_view_2: Side view with the red barrel on the left and blue barrel on the right, both showing extensive rust and black liquid streaks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the blue barrel in front, highlighting the open top and black liquid stains, no labels visible.
